title: CI: package_versions: include hostinfo, kernel
body:
In the package_versions CI step, include Fedora/Ubuntu
version and 'uname -r'

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

comments.body: New force push: I decided to prefix `uname` with "Kernel", and, in response to our scrum conversation this morning, to include cgroups version.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago*, *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Tests green after many, many flakes. I've confirmed that host info now appears in package_versions.

/hold cancel
